actions.text: standing with arms folded, critiquing a painting
walking slowly through the gallery hall
sitting on a bench, admiring a sculpture
standing close to a canvas, examining brushstrokes
reading a plaque next to an artwork
sketching in a notebook, inspired by the art
standing back to view a large installation
discussing art quietly with a companion
leaning in to read a tiny label
walking quietly to the next room
holding a gallery leaflet while comparing two paintings
